name: Charlie Pagnard
body: PTL!! Continuing to pray for little Lyla!!

name: Renee Runyon
body: I really do think God chuckles as He coordinates all these little "coincidences" in life that really are everyday miracles, if we choose to see them as they truly are. He is such a loving Father to work things out for our good, as He does, even when we don't realize it--or appreciate it. Thank you, Lee, for sharing these contrasts and the "rear-view mirror" look to see how God has been there all along. We praise God for His protection over Lyla through this surgery!!!

name: Craig and Lisa Dotson
body: It is a blessing to read your posts. It is a blessing to pray for your daughter and your family. It is a blessing to know you, Lee. 🤗🙏🏼🩷

name: Chuck N Lori W
body: Praise God for His blessings! Continuing to keep you all in our prayers! 🙏🙏

name: Charlotte Canakes
body: Such a wonderful update to find before bedtime. Praising and giving thanks to God with you!!
